name: ops_recovery_hotfix_openrouter_v1
description:
timeout | validation | rejected | retry payload
입력 1줄 -> 복구결과 3종(원인 분류, retry payload, 실행 next actions)으로 바로 반환합니다. 0.02 진입 티어이며 결과에 recommended_next_tier( none|turbo|guardrail )를 포함합니다.

failed_payload.description: Optional failed request payload or body text.

persona_mode.description: Optional lane preference: price, speed, completion.

buyer_goal.description: Optional one-line buyer outcome to optimize for.
